name: Ucal Fuel Systems Limited
summary: Ucal Fuel Systems Limited provides fuel management systems for the automotive sector in India. The company offers multi point fuel injection parts, including throttle body assemblies, fuel rail assemblies, high pressure fuel filters, pressure regulators, and pulsation dampers; carburetors; and emission control products, such as positive crankcase ventilation valves and intake manifolds for four wheelers. It also provides carburetors; emission control products comprising secondary air valves; and EMS system products that include throttle bodies, fuel pumps, air compressors, and fuel rail assemblies for two/three wheelers. In addition, the company offers carburetors and electronic solenoid fuel pumps for gensets; oil, vacuum, and water pump assemblies, as well as fuel pumps; high pressure die casting products, which comprise air intake and steering systems, turbochargers, and emission control and other products; and precision machined products, such as shaft second clutches, housing spring and body injectors, and transmission and rocker arm shafts. It also exports its products. Ucal Fuel Systems Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Chennai, India.
